title: FedRAMP Assessor Information (MKT-IAS-WEB)
description: Public information an Independent Assessment Service must supply in machine-readable format on their website per MKT-IAS-WEB.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: General description of the independent assessment service (MKT-IAS-WEB).

contactInformation.title: Contact Information
contactInformation.description: Contact information for the assessor organization (MKT-IAS-WEB).

servicesOffered.title: Services Offered
servicesOffered.description: Types of independent assessment services the assessor offers (MKT-IAS-WEB).

customerReferences.title: Customer References
customerReferences.description: Positive attestations from customers or customer references. Optional per MKT-IAS-WEB.

serviceOffering.title: Service Offering
serviceOffering.description: A specific type of assessment service offered by the assessor.

serviceName.title: Service Name
serviceName.description: Name of the assessment service type offered.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.description: Description of this service type and its scope.
